title: Limited Spawner Spawns
description: Sets a limited number of spawns that a spawner can spawn, so you don't get swarmed!
body:
This mod will set a limited number of spawns for each spawner, so that you don't get swarmed by endless waves of enemies.

Instead of having to kill unlimited amounts of enemies until you reach and either make the room/spawner safe, it will stop spawning after 20 spawns.
